content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Tian paid a huge price, sacrificing a replica body to deduce the wisdom body of the Jiaye Body, and constantly combined the dimensional domain in the body to create, often causing the dimensional domain to collapse.

But in the research and deduction again and again, the harvest is also quite large.

After a thousand domain yuan years had passed, Ye Tian had only come up with a very ordinary ~ dimensional domain body with great side effects.

This dimensional domain body, Ye Tian is still named the Jiaye Wisdom Domain, but if you practice this dimensional domain, the cost is very high, the potential of the body must be damaged, and the sequelae will be even greater if you use the secret technique of the Jiaye Wisdom Domain-Multidimensional Wisdom-Light.

However, Ye Tian didn't care.

Of course, his current True Body Replica Body would definitely not be able to cultivate the Dimensional Domain Body of the Ka Ye Wisdom Domain, unless he cultivated both the Primordial Domain Body and the Phantom Domain Body to the consummation realm.

Therefore, in order to be able to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Domain Body, he could only copy the past copy body, and that copy body had not yet cultivated the Phantom Domain Body, and could completely cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Domain Body.

Subsequently.

He began to cultivate the Ka Ye Wisdom Domain Body, and after a period of time, he successfully cultivated it.

Immediately afterward, he began to cast a multi-dimensional wisdom light, and then cooperated with the mirror of Xuanlin to comprehend the primordial star and comprehend the rules of the dimension.

This time he cultivated, he found that the efficiency of comprehending the rules of the dimension had increased too quickly.

So, in the following years, he was doing his best to comprehend the dimensional rules, and the realm of dimensional rules continued to soar.

In a flash, another thousand yuan years have passed.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already comprehended the rules of the two hundred and eighty dimensions, and although the efficiency of comprehension was a little slower now, it was still extremely fast.

And now his strength is too strong, and he has even created another Seven Realms Supreme Peerless Sect - Taichu Escape!

In addition, his Primordial Domain and Phantom Domain were much stronger, and they had all reached the peak realm of Dacheng.

In terms of soul will, he spent a lot of resources to raise the soul will to the late stage of the fourteenth dimension.

His current strength is much stronger than in the past, and he is sure to kill the weaker Eighth Realm.

this day.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord contacted Ye Tian again.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the Spell Spirit Gold Vein and saw the Purple Yun Realm Lord again.

At this time, the Purple Yun Realm Lord was in good condition, his injuries had healed, and his aura was much stronger.

And.

Ye Tian found that the Purple Yun Realm Lord's soul will seemed to be even more terrifying, as if he had broken through.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, your soul will has broken through?"

Ye Tian asked in surprise.

"Yes, I have been staying in the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, I have been resisting the power of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, and the soul will is equivalent to being sharpened all the time, and now I have finally broken the shackles and been promoted to the seventeenth dimension!"

The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

"The Eighth Realm can raise the Soul Will to the Seventeenth Dimension?"

Ye Tian felt incredible.

"It's really impossible to do it under normal circumstances, but I have cultivated a special dimensional domain body, which can allow me to break the limit of my soul will and advance to the seventeenth dimension. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

However, she was also very grateful to Ye Tian, if it weren't for Ye Tian helping her get a large amount of Yuanxia Mother Fluid, as well as healing things, to help her recover, otherwise she would not have been able to impact the soul will of the seventeenth dimension.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord continued: "If my soul will breaks through, I can cultivate a secret technique, which can weaken the deduction and analysis of the Ninth Realm, and I can also use a lot of spell spirit gold plus a star fragment I obtained in the past to refine a dimensional star weapon to cover my traces, and when the time comes, I will be sure to evade the tracking and detection of the Poison Dragon Realm Lord." "

"Congratulations to the Purple Yun Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, if I leave, you can take the Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone here, these things are of little use to me, you can deal with them yourself. The Purple Yun Realm Lord said.

"Thank you, Purple Yun Realm Master!"

Ye Tian thanks.

The Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stone is a treasure with no side effects, and if it is given to the human race, it can definitely cultivate a large number of strong people.

So, this thing is of great use to him.

"However, I still lack some auxiliary materials for refining dimensional star weapons, I can't go out and collect them, you can help me collect them, those materials are not too precious, if you collect them slowly, you can still collect them." "

Immediately, the Purple Yun Realm Lord gave Ye Tian the list of those auxiliary materials.

Ask for flowers0

In the days that followed, Ye Tian collected those materials for the Purple Yun Realm Lord, a total of more than sixty kinds, most of which could be easily collected, and some could be traded at a great cost.

There is only one kind, and it is difficult to buy in the seventh realm.

However, through a force, he paid a high price, and the deal was obtained.

Of course.

With such a large-scale transaction, he naturally attracted the attention of some of the Seventh Realm, and there was even a Seventh Realm who tried to attack him, but was directly killed by him in an instant.

And he hid his identity many times in transactions, but he didn't reveal himself.

After collecting these materials, Ye Tian sent them to the Purple Yun Realm Lord.

Immediately afterward, the Purple Yun Realm Lord began to refine the dimensional star weapon.

Refining a dimensional star weapon is not easy, and it takes a long time.

Ye Tian is his protector to prevent other extradimensional realms from approaching here, although this possibility is very small, it is better to be careful.

And this Dharma protector has passed a full period of time.

this day.

Rumble!!!!!

A dimensional star weapon was born, and its powerful aura shocked Ye Tiandu, and it was the first time he had seen the birth of a dimensional star weapon.

The dimensional star weapon refined by the master of the Purple Yun Realm is called the Purple Yun Star Clothes, which is worn on the body, similar to the effect of the Spell Spirit Gold Vein, but it does not cause much damage to the body, has the effect of shielding the deduction and analysis of the Ninth Realm, and also has a certain defensive effect.

"Alright, I can get out of here!"

The main path of the Purple Rhyme Realm.

Immediately.

The Purple Yun Realm Lord withdrew the formation here, and Ye Tian immediately took those Gray Mist Heavenly Dao Stones.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian and the Purple Yun Realm Lord went out of here together and returned to the Upper Domain, and the Purgatory Holy Sect in charge of this place didn't know what was going on at all.

......

Upper domain.

Territory No. 336.

Ye Tian and the Purple Yun Realm Lord came here.

"Once, our Tianyun Sect was here, but unfortunately it is a thing of the past!" said the Purple Yun Realm Lord resentfully.

"Purple Yun Realm Lord, what are we going to do next?"

Ye Tian asked.

"I need to hit the ninth realm first, if I can't break through to the ninth realm, I can't threaten the Lord of the Poison Dragon Realm!"
